headline: Is Genuine Parts (GPC) A Bargain After Q2 Earnings Beat And Reaffirmed Guidance?
summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) is back in focus after releasing Q2 2026 results that topped Wall Street expectations on both earnings and revenue, with the industrial business leading performance and full year guidance reaffirmed. See our latest analysis for Genuine Parts. Genuine Parts shares have been volatile around the Q2 release, with the stock down 2.7% on the day but showing a 9.6% 1 month share price return and a 6.6% 3 month share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down...

headline: Genuine Parts Q2 sales up 6%, full-year EPS guidance lowered
summary: Sales for the three months to 30 June 2026 came in at $6.53bn, compared with $6.16bn in the corresponding period last year.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Genuine Parts, Raises Price Target to $126
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Scot Ciccarelli   maintains Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) with a Hold and raises the price target from $124 to $126.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Genuine Parts, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Greg Melich   maintains Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $145 to $150.
